ecarx.carext.userprofile

Interface IUserProfile.IUserProfileObserver

  • Enclosing interface:
    IUserProfile

    public static interface IUserProfile.IUserProfileObserver
    user profile observer

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void onUserProfileActionError(int action, int code)
      Error code when something is wrong
      void onUserProfileActionGet(java.lang.String profileJsonString)
      Profile json string
      void onUserProfileActionStatus(int action, int profileId, int status)
      callback when do user profile action IUserProfile.ActionType or profile action status changed self
      void onUserProfileActionStatus(int action, int profileId, int status, int progress)
      progress Face entry progress value
      void onUserProfileAdded(int profileId)
      callback when called IUserProfile.addUserProfile(), and add user profile succeed

    • Method Detail

      • onUserProfileAdded

        void onUserProfileAdded(int profileId)
        callback when called IUserProfile.addUserProfile(), and add user profile succeed
        Parameters:
        profileId - The User profile id added

      • onUserProfileActionStatus

        void onUserProfileActionStatus(int action,
                               int profileId,
                               int status)
        callback when do user profile action IUserProfile.ActionType or profile action status changed self
        Parameters:
        action - profile action IUserProfile.ActionType, e.g. add / remove profile
        profileId - The User profile id, can be ignored for IUserProfile.ACTION_TYPE_PROFILE_ADD
        status - action status IUserProfile.ActionStatus

      • onUserProfileActionError

        void onUserProfileActionError(int action,
                              int code)
        Error code when something is wrong
        Parameters:
        action - profile action IUserProfile.ActionType, e.g. add / remove profile
        code - error code IUserProfile.ErrorCode

      • onUserProfileActionStatus

        void onUserProfileActionStatus(int action,
                               int profileId,
                               int status,
                               int progress)
        progress Face entry progress value
        Parameters:
        action - profile action IUserProfile.ActionType, e.g. add / remove profile
        profileId - The User profile id, can be ignored for IUserProfile.ACTION_TYPE_PROFILE_ADD
        status - action status IUserProfile.ActionStatus
        progress - face entry progress

      • onUserProfileActionGet

        void onUserProfileActionGet(java.lang.String profileJsonString)
        Profile json string
        Parameters:
        profileJsonString - profile data IUserProfile.getUserProfileData(int)
